instruction: You are a health-conscious chef (User ID: user_123). Please ask the AI Service Agent to confirm the nutritional information of the rectangular cheese located at the innermost position. Have the AI Service Agent determine if the protein content of this cheese is higher than 25g per 100g. If it is, ask the AI Service Agent to find cheeses that are produced in France and have a "creamy" flavor, and add the one with the lowest calorie count to your cart. If there are multiple cheeses tied for the lowest calories among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find cheeses with a discount factor better than 0.85 and priced below 40 yuan, and add the one with the lowest fat content to your cart. If there are multiple cheeses tied for the lowest fat content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Additionally, have the AI Service Agent check the origin of the cheese whose label is furthest to the right. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to check the shopping list and add any items from the list that are not yet in your cart and have a unit price below 30 yuan to the cart. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total fat content of all items in your cart.

If it’s below 450mg, please find Italian-region cheeses with a creamy texture and add the most expensive one to my cart, including all tied highest-priced ones. If it exceeds 450mg, please instead choose the American cheeses with more than 350 calories that have the largest discount, and add all tied items.
